report.summary: UX audited 5 new learn guides from today's build cycle, created 2 missing OG images, and applied 12 UX refinements (BackToTop, canonical URLs, responsive typography).

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: depin-ecosystem-guide-2026: Added BackToTop component for long-page navigation
depin-ecosystem-guide-2026: Added canonical URL (alternates.canonical) for SEO
depin-ecosystem-guide-2026: Fixed H1 from hardcoded 36px to responsive clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.25rem)
crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026: Added BackToTop component
crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026: Added canonical URL
crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026: Fixed H1 from hardcoded 36px to responsive clamp(1.75rem, 4vw, 2.25rem)
citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup-guide-2026: Added BackToTop component
citrea-bitcoin-zk-rollup-guide-2026: Added canonical URL
crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption-guide-2026: Added BackToTop component
crypto-etf-in-kind-redemption-guide-2026: Added canonical URL
paradex-zk-perpetuals-guide-2026: Already had BackToTop and canonical URL — no fixes needed

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: depin-ecosystem-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — network node decoration, brand gradient, stats boxes (650+ projects, $9B market cap, 270% YoY growth), protocol names
OG image: crypto-gas-fees-transaction-costs-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — fee trend chart visualization, L2 cost comparison boxes (ETH $0.44, Arbitrum $0.009, Solana $0.001), amber-green gradient

sections.title: Audit Findings
items: FIXED: 4/5 pages missing BackToTop component — now added
FIXED: 4/5 pages missing canonical URLs — now added
FIXED: 2/5 pages had hardcoded H1 font-size (36px) instead of responsive clamp() — now responsive
FIXED: 2/5 pages had missing OG images (DePIN, Gas Fees) — now created
OK: All 5 pages have proper breadcrumb navigation, structured data, FAQ sections, and openGraph metadata
OK: Tables have overflowX: auto for mobile horizontal scroll on DePIN and Gas Fees guides
NOTE: DePIN and Gas Fees guides use inline nav breadcrumbs instead of Breadcrumb component — deferred to future standardization pass
